description: Parble is an AI-powered document processing service that classifies documents and extracts structured data from files such as invoices, receipts, bank statements, and purchase orders. The contract.fit website presents Parble as part of Netcall and offers hosted document-processing workflows for businesses.
summary: contract.fit (Parble) exposes one documented REST API at `https://api.parble.com/v1/parble` with a machine-readable Swagger/OpenAPI spec; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI were found.
